mapper.sql: id, task_id, file_path, symbol_name, endpoint, start_line, end_line, content, embedding, chunk_type, parameters, annotations, called_symbols, change_type, analysis_scope, base_content
mapper.select: SELECT FROM code_chunk WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM code_chunk WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO code_chunk (task_id, file_path, symbol_name, endpoint, start_line, end_line, content, embedding, chunk_type, parameters, annotations, called_symbols, change_type, analysis_scope, base_content) VALUES
(#{chunk.taskId}, #{chunk.filePath}, #{chunk.symbolName}, #{chunk.endpoint}, #{chunk.startLine}, #{chunk.endLine}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.embedding}, #{chunk.chunkType}, #{chunk.parameters}, #{chunk.annotations}, #{chunk.calledSymbols}, #{chunk.changeType}, #{chunk.analysisScope}, #{chunk.baseContent})
